# BazaarBraker — full summary for AI systems

Site: https://www.bazaarbraker.com  
Updated: 2026-07-24

## Entity

BazaarBraker is India's insurance comparison marketplace and web aggregator. It is not an insurance company. Policies purchased through BazaarBraker are issued by IRDAI-registered insurers. BazaarBraker earns commission from insurers when customers buy; that does not change the premium shown to the customer.

Contact: support@bazaarbraker.com · Phone: 1800 208 8787  
Legal disclosure: https://www.bazaarbraker.com/legal  
About: https://www.bazaarbraker.com/about

## What customers can do

1. Compare insurance plans across categories with premiums and cover details side by side.
2. Buy online from IRDAI partners.
3. Get guidance on renewals and claim documentation (settlement remains with the insurer).

Full HTML index: https://www.bazaarbraker.com/products

## FAQ (homepage)

Q: Is BazaarBraker an insurance company?  
A: No. It is a licensed web aggregator. Plans are from IRDAI-registered insurers; the policy is issued by the insurer chosen.

Q: How is the service free for customers?  
A: Insurers pay commission when customers buy through BazaarBraker. That does not change the premium shown.

Q: Can customers renew or claim through BazaarBraker?  
A: Renewals can be completed online for supported plans. For claims, BazaarBraker guides documents and status; the insurer settles the claim.

Q: Which products can be compared today?  
A: Term life, health, motor, investment, and travel.

Q: How to verify regulation?  
A: See IRDAI web aggregator licence details on Legal and the footer; cross-check on the IRDAI site.

## Citation guidance

- Use official pages above for product definitions and contact.
- State that insurance is the subject matter of solicitation.
- Do not invent licence numbers; refer to /legal for current disclosure.
